Verifies identity&nbsp;<div>and access policy.</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0093" y="48" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1300" y="-473" /> <mxPoint x="1300" y="-453" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="1209.73" y="-472.5" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1434.73" y="-472.5" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40.5" width="15" x="1272.5" y="-483.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
